results.title: Devotees throng Gundicha Temple to witness ritual that humanises divinity
results.description: Devotees throng Puri’s Gundicha Temple for Hera Panchami, where Goddess Lakshmi confronts Lord Jagannath and a chariot is symbolically damaged.

results.title: India's infrastructure output rises 5% y/y in June under new series
results.description: NEW DELHI, July 20 (Reuters) - India's infrastructure output grew 5% year-on-year in June, its fastest pace in five months, according to the first data relea...
